rationale.R1.2: The review identifies several inconsistencies in the pipeline description (span alignment, adequacy reference, round count) and proposes concrete fixes.
rationale.RX.1: While the review expresses uncertainty about some claims (e.g., generalization), it doesn't explicitly flag uncertainty for specific recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The review focuses on the abstract and doesn't directly assess whether it covers all requested dimensions. However, it does point out scope creep in the model-agnostic claim.
rationale.RX.4: The review highlights potential harm (e.g., ungrammatical seams) if the pipeline is implemented as described, suggesting a minor regression risk.
rationale.RX.5: The review doesn't discuss provenance or traceability of the claims made in the abstract.
